inputs.label: Meters (m)
inputs.businessContext: Length in meters to convert to feet

inputs.label: Kilograms (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Mass in kilograms to convert to pounds

inputs.label: Liters (L)
inputs.businessContext: Volume in liters to convert to US gallons

inputs.label: Celsius (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature in Celsius to convert to Fahrenheit

outputs.primary: 'Conversions: ' + meters + 'm => ' + feet.toFixed(2) + 'ft, ' + kilograms + 'kg => ' + pounds.toFixed(2) + 'lbs, ' + liters + 'L => ' + gallons.toFixed(2) + 'gal, ' + celsius + '°C => ' + fahrenheit.toFixed(2) + '°F'
